title: selaginella geniculata var. conduplicata
intro: Selaginella geniculata var. conduplicata, also known as the winged spikemoss, is a type of rare and endemic plant species found in the Philippines. This plant is known for its traditional medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella geniculata var. conduplicata include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal remedies such as salves, ointments, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
